seo.title: GPA Calculator | Numerly
seo.description: Calculate GPA from course letter grades and credit hours, with optional cumulative GPA support.

intro: Estimate your GPA from course letter grades and credits.
explanation: Enter each course grade and credit value. The calculator weights grades by credits and divides total points by total credits. Use the cumulative GPA toggle to include prior GPA and credits.

formula.expression: GPA = Sum(grade points x credits) / Sum(credits)

variables.name: grade points
variables.meaning: Numeric value of each letter grade

example.input: A in 3 credits, B in 3 credits

faqs.a: Yes, sum all weighted points and credits.

faqs.q: Does this convert percentages to letters?

faqs.a: Only if your system supports weighted scales.
No, official GPA comes from your institution.

formulaExplanation: Add each course grade and credit. GPA equals total weighted points divided by total credits.
edgeCases: Boundary values can produce very different outcomes.
Rounding may cause slight differences from manual estimates.
practicalTips: Use related calculators to cross-validate results.
